title: BenchFlow agent manifest (contract v1)
description: Data-only declaration of a hosted agent (ADR-0001/0003). Anything requiring code (credential files, config-file emission, provider translation beyond a rename) lives in the agent's shim, not here.

contract_version.description: SemVer MAJOR.MINOR of the {manifest + ACP + proxy-env} contract this agent targets.

protocol.description: The single host kind. Non-ACP platforms are wrapped in an ACP-stdio shim.

install_cmd.description: Idempotent bash run once in the sandbox before connection.

env_mapping.description: Declarative renames from canonical BENCHFLOW_PROVIDER_* to the agent's native vars. File-config translation belongs in the shim.
